Edinburgh is one of the most atmospheric cities in Europe. 🏴✨ Capital of Scotland, it’s a city shaped by medieval streets, volcanic hills, dramatic viewpoints and centuries of history. Its Old Town and New Town are both part of a UNESCO World Heritage Site, showing two very different sides of the city: the dark, narrow closes of the Old Town and the elegant Georgian architecture of the New Town. The castle dominates the skyline from Castle Rock, while the Royal Mile connects some of the most historic parts of the city. Around every corner you find stone façades, hidden courtyards, old pubs, bookshops and viewpoints that make Edinburgh feel almost cinematic. Places like Victoria Street, Dean Village, Calton Hill, The Vennel and Circus Lane show why this city is so special: it’s not just beautiful, it has character. Edinburgh is moody, elegant, literary, historic and unforgettable — one of those places that feels different from anywhere else in the UK. 🖤 #Edinburgh #Scotland #VisitScotland #EdinburghCastle #EuropeTravel

Lake Como is one of those places that somehow feels even more beautiful in real life. 🇮🇹✨ Between historic villas, quiet lakeside villages, mountain views and peaceful boat rides, every corner feels cinematic without even trying. From Bellagio to Varenna, Menaggio to hidden spots like Lierna and Nesso, the atmosphere here is what makes people fall in love with Northern Italy. 🌿🌊 What I love most about Lake Como is that it can feel luxurious and relaxing at the same time. One moment you’re walking through elegant gardens and historic streets, the next you’re simply sitting by the water watching the boats pass slowly across the lake. It’s not just a destination — it’s a whole atmosphere. And honestly, one of the most timeless places to experience in Italy. ☀️ #LakeComo #LagoDiComo #ItalyTravel #NorthernItaly #BeautifulDestinations

Coolest thing to do whilst you’re visiting Athens!!  The Cine Paris cinema sits on a rooftop in Plaka with a direct view of the illuminated Acropolis 🍿 Tickets are only €10, there are 2 sessions each night and they show english films. But book ahead, it sells out! Save this for your trip to Greece 🫶🇬🇷 #athens #athensgreece #greecetravel #openaircinema #europesummer

Ring Road 🇮🇸🚗✨ During our time in Iceland, we drove the famous Ring Road to experience as much of the country as possible. If you’re visiting for a short time, I highly recommend taking this drive. Around every corner, you’ll find breathtaking landscapes, waterfalls, glaciers, and views that feel almost unreal. To this day, Iceland remains one of my favorite places I’ve ever visited ❄️ Have you driven the Ring Road, or is Iceland still on your travel bucket list? Let me know below! 👇🏽 Follow along for more cinematic content! #cinematictravel #iceland #icelandtravel #icelandtrip #ringroad

DAY 59/60: The Life of a Student Videographer I post all my videos in 5:4 (1350×1080), and it’s become my favorite format. I love the cinematic look of horizontal videos, but vertical performs better because it fills more of the screen. 5:4 is the perfect middle ground—it keeps the horizontal feel while taking up more space in the feed. It also lets me shoot everything horizontally without rotating my camera and simply crop in during editing. It’s the best of both worlds. Follow me, to be part of my journey  #videography #students #cinematographers #series #videographytips

Want cinematic car videos? Master these 6 essential gimbal moves. 🎥👇 If you want to level up your automotive filmmaking, smooth and intentional motion is everything. Here are the 6 essential car videography shots you can easily pull off using the DJI RS 5 (paired here with the Sony A7S III and a 24-70mm lens): 1️⃣ Front Jib Down: Perfect for establishing the vehicle's aggressive front stance. 2️⃣ Orbit + Push In: Adds dynamic depth and highlights the body lines. 3️⃣ Rim Detail Drop: A smooth, low-angle must-have for showcasing the wheels. 4️⃣ Logo Orbit + Jib Up: Builds brand presence and creates sleek transitions. 5️⃣ Walk-Back Reveal: Great for capturing the environment alongside the car. 6️⃣ Detail Quarter Orbit: Focuses on sharp, aesthetic design details. With the new tracking module on the RS 5, these 6 shots are more than easy to do, especially the jib down, which was a bit tricky without a tracking option. @DJI Official  #gimbaloperator #automotive #porsche #tutorial #howto

How I make my photos feel more cinematic 📸 1. Clean up the frame — remove anything that pulls attention away from the subject. 2. Build separation with color grading and selective masking in Lightroom. 3. Add controlled sunlight and light falloff to create more depth and atmosphere. Full setting:  Color grading (Lightroom) Mask 1: Model • Exposure: +0.5 • Contrast: -3 • Saturation: +20 • Temperature: +6 Mask 2: Background • Exposure: -0.5 • Contrast: +10 Mask 3: Rock • Exposure: +0.3 • Contrast: +15 • Saturation: +20 • Temperature: +6 Mask 4: Sky • Exposure: -0.6 • Contrast: +25 • Temperature: -38 • Tint: -20 #beforeandafter #cinematicphoto #photoshopediting #cinematiclook #editingtips
